# highlight sample
factory: {
  inputs: {
    name: {
      type: string
      description: 'Name'
    }
    count: { type: optional(integer) }
  }
  locals: {
    interpolated: $'name={{ input.name }}'
    banner: $'''>-
      region: {{ input.name }}
      '''
    enabled: true
    missing: null
    math: (input.count ?? 0) + 1 >= 2 && !false
    ids: [ for s in input.subnets : s.id when s.public ]
  }
  resources: {
    server: example.web {
      name: local.interpolated
      tags.env: 'dev'
    }
  }
}
